T

testAddEventAndSearchByID() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.01.01 Tests that EventData.addOrEditEvent() adds an event and it can be found by searchEventID().
TestCancelledEntrants() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.06.02 Tests that cancelled entrants are stored correctly.
testDeletingNonExistentEventDoesNotCrash() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.AdminUnitTest
US 03.01.01 Tests that trying to delete an event that doesn't exist in the list does not crash and leaves the list unchanged.
testEditEventUpdatesInsteadOfDuplicating() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.01.01 Tests that addOrEditEvent() updates an existing event rather than adding a duplicate when the same eventID is used.
TestEnrolledEntrants() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.06.03 Tests that enrolled entrants are stored correctly.
testEventCreationHasCorrectTitleAndDescription() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.01.01 Tests that an Event stores its title and description correctly.
testEventIDsAreUnique() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.01.01 Tests that two randomly generated event IDs are never equal.
testEventItemCreation() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.AdminUnitTest
US 03.04.01 - As an administrator, I want to be able to browse events.
testEventItemHandlesEmptyFields() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.AdminUnitTest
US 03.04.01 Tests that when an event has an empty string for title, the placeholder logic still correctly substitutes the fallback.
testEventItemHandlesMissingFields() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.AdminUnitTest
US 03.04.01 Tests that when an event has no title or description (missing Firestore fields), our placeholder logic correctly substitutes readable fallback strings.
testEventItemHasValidDocumentIdForDeletion() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.AdminUnitTest
US 03.01.01 - As an administrator, I want to be able to remove events.
testEventRemovedFromListAfterDeletion() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.AdminUnitTest
US 03.01.01 Tests that after simulating a deletion from a list, the event is actually removed and the list size decreases by 1.
testInvalidDateRangeStartAfterEnd() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.01.04 Tests that an invalid registration period (start after end) is detected.
TestInvitedEntrants() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.06.01 Tests that invited entrants are stored correctly.
TestJoinedWaitingList() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.02.01 Tests that the entrants who joined the waiting list are stored correctly.
testMaxCapacityMustBePositive() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.05.02 Tests that maxCapacity must be positive — can't sample 0 or fewer.
testMaxCapacityStoredCorrectly() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.05.02 Tests that maxCapacity (number to sample) is stored correctly on Event.
testNegativeWaitingListLimitIsInvalid() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.03.01 Tests that a negative waiting list limit is invalid.
testOrganizerItemCreationForDemotion() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.AdminUnitTest
US 03.05.01 As an administrator, I want to remove organizers that violate app policy Simulates organizer creation
testQRCodeCanBeSetOnEvent() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.01.01 Tests that a QR code can be set and retrieved on an Event object.
testQRCodeFormatIsCorrect() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.01.01 Tests that the QR code string is built in the correct format.
testRegistrationPeriodStoredCorrectly() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.01.04 Tests that start and end registration dates are stored correctly.
testSampleSizeCannotExceedWaitingListSize() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.05.02 Tests that the sample size cannot exceed the waiting list size.
testSampleSizeEqualToWaitingListIsValid() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.05.02 Tests that a sample size equal to the waiting list size is valid.
testUserItemCreation() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.AdminUnitTest
US 03.02.01 As an administrator, I want to be able to browse profiles Testing that the UserItem is made correctly with the expected fields
testUserItemHandlesMissingFields() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.AdminUnitTest
US 03.02.01 Tests missing Firestore fields (placeholder fallbacks)
testUserItemHasValidDocumentIdForDeletion() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.AdminUnitTest
US 03.03.01 As an administratos, I want to be able to remove profiles Tests that a UserItem intended for deletion has a documentID since that's what's passed to the Firestore's delete call.
testUserRemovedFromListAfterDeletion() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.AdminUnitTest
US 3.03.01 Tests that after a deletion from the list, the user is actually removed and the list size is decreased by 1
testValidDateRangeStartBeforeEnd() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.01.04 Tests the date validation logic from CreateEvent.java — a valid registration period has start before end.
testWaitingListLimitStoredWhenProvided() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.03.01 Tests that a waiting list limit is stored correctly when provided.
testWaitingListLimitZeroMeansNoLimit() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.03.01 Tests that waitingListLimit of 0 is treated as "no limit".
